evals.prompt: 请把这篇文章改写成一篇中文博客并生成封面，然后发布到微信公众号草稿箱：https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/building-effective-agents
evals.expected_output: 会先用 Chrome DevTools MCP 抓取正文并形成结构化笔记，再生成中文 Markdown 博客。写作前会在用户未指定风格时从 40 项风格池随机选择 1 个 `selected_style`，并让文章表达、封面 brief、封面 prompt 和图片验收使用同一个风格。封面阶段默认读取 `references/cover-prompt-template.md`，创建 `src/assets/{ID}/cover-brief.json`，记录 `summary_angle`、`narrative_flow`、`information_blocks`、`selected_style`、`selected_style_prompt_descriptor`、`selected_style_reason` 和 `style_safety_note`，再用可用的图像生成 / 编辑技能完成封面，把最终选中图保存为 `src/assets/{ID}/01-cover.{ext}`，并把 `ogImage` 与 `wechat-draft` 的 `cover-image` 都指向这个最终实际路径。

assertions.text: Cover generation stays backend-agnostic by default instead of hardcoding a specific image-generation skill.
When no style is specified, the workflow randomly selects exactly one style from the 40-item style pool before writing.
The same selected style is used for article expression, cover brief, cover prompt, and cover acceptance.
The cover brief records `summary_angle`, `narrative_flow`, `information_blocks`, `selected_style`, `selected_style_prompt_descriptor`, `selected_style_reason`, and `style_safety_note`.
The final cover image is saved under `src/assets/{ID}/` rather than left in a generated-images temp/default directory.
`ogImage` and the WeChat `cover-image` parameter reference the final cover path.
After WeChat draft publishing succeeds and returns `media_id`, the workflow commits and pushes only the generated blog post and assets.

evals.prompt: 把这个产品发布页写成中文博客，封面用默认方式生成，不要做成产品截图：https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-image-2/
evals.expected_output: 会把文章类型识别为产品更新 / 发布型，封面 brief 中选择 `release`。用户未指定风格时，不再按 release 固定选择日漫，而是从 40 项风格池随机选择 1 个 `selected_style`，并把对应的 `selected_style_prompt_descriptor` 写进封面 prompt。封面不是泛主题插画，而是单张宽封面的 infographic summary：用 `2-4` 个来源可追溯的信息块概括发布重点，文字默认只保留 `1-3` 处少量中文短标签或数字，但仍然禁止主标题、假 UI、假 dashboard、假图表和假终端。

assertions.text: The cover type is selected from the fixed taxonomy and is appropriate for a product/release article.
Unspecified release covers use random style selection from the style pool rather than a fixed comic-style mapping.
The selected style descriptor is included in the image prompt while the cover still follows infographic-story constraints.
The cover concept expresses the article theme without pretending to be a real product screenshot.

evals.prompt: 请用 Azure OpenAI 生成封面，把这篇英文教程改写成中文博客并推到微信草稿箱，封面用美漫超级英雄风：https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/how-to/dall-e
evals.expected_output: 会尊重用户明确指定 Azure 和 `美漫超级英雄风` 的要求，在封面阶段使用 `azure-image-gen`，并把 `selected_style` 设为 `美漫超级英雄风`。仍然先生成 `cover-brief.json`，使用该风格对应的安全描述词构造单张宽封面的 infographic-story prompt，并把 Azure 脚本最终输出的实际文件路径（可能是 `.png`、`.jpg` 或 `.webp`）同步到 Markdown `ogImage` 和 `wechat-draft` 的 `cover-image`。

assertions.text: An explicit Azure preference is honored for cover generation even though the default flow is backend-agnostic.
An explicit style request overrides random style selection.
The prompt uses the safe descriptor for `美漫超级英雄风` rather than reverting to the old two-option comic-style field.
The Azure final output path extension is treated as authoritative.
The final image path is propagated consistently to blog frontmatter and WeChat publishing.
After WeChat draft publishing succeeds, the workflow reports `media_id`, commit hash, and pushed branch.

evals.prompt: 把这篇架构文章写成中文博客。封面可以参考正文里的架构图，但不能照抄，也不能生成假的架构标签：https://example.com/agent-workflow-architecture
evals.expected_output: 会把文章类型识别为架构 / 系统设计。用户未指定风格时，会从 40 项风格池随机选择 1 个风格，而不是按 workflow / pipeline 固定选择日漫。封面仍用 `2-4` 个来源可追溯的信息块把流程压成单张宽封面；参考图只用于主体关系或空间结构，不用于像素级临摹；最终 prompt 仍禁止假架构节点名、假 dashboard、假图表坐标和 screenshot 风格。

assertions.text: Reference images are used only for composition or subject relationships, not pixel-level copying.
Architecture covers use the one selected style from the random pool unless the user specifies a style.
Architecture covers may show abstract connections and flow markers but must not create fake labeled system diagrams.
The prompt includes a clear avoid list for fake labels and screenshot-like artifacts.

evals.prompt: 只把这个链接写成博客，不要生成封面，也不要发微信：https://example.com/short-note
evals.expected_output: 会尊重用户明确的范围限制：仍然抓取 URL、生成中文 Markdown、写入 frontmatter 和参考链接，并在写作前随机确定 1 个 `selected_style` 作为文章表达的轻量风格方向；但跳过封面生成，不写 `ogImage`，也不调用 `wechat-draft`。

assertions.text: The explicit no-cover request prevents any image-generation skill from being invoked.
The explicit no-WeChat request prevents `wechat-draft` from being invoked.
The blog article is still generated normally without `ogImage`.
A selected style may still guide article expression lightly without triggering image generation.
The explicit no-WeChat request also skips the post-publish git commit and push flow.

evals.prompt: 把这篇观点文章改写成中文博客并生成封面：https://example.com/spec-driven-ai-opinion
evals.expected_output: 会把文章识别为 `analysis`，但用户未指定风格时不会固定选择美漫，而是从 40 项风格池随机选择 1 个 `selected_style`。封面仍然做成单张宽封面的 infographic storytelling summary：至少压出 `2` 个能映射回原文的叙事信息块，而不是只画一张泛技术氛围图。

assertions.text: When style is unspecified for an `analysis` article, the brief randomly selects one style from the 40-item pool.
The cover summary contains at least two article-grounded information blocks rather than a generic thematic illustration.
The prompt forbids poster titles, fake UI labels, fake chart axes, and fabricated metrics regardless of the selected style.

evals.prompt: 把这篇研究解读写成中文博客，封面指定新海诚光影风，并保留一两个关键数字：https://example.com/model-paper-breakdown
evals.expected_output: 会把文章识别为 `research`，并尊重用户明确指定的 `新海诚光影风`，把它记录为 `selected_style`。由于该名称强指向特定在世作者，最终 prompt 使用安全描述词，例如高透明天空、强逆光、细腻云层、青春电影感光影、雨水和反射细节，并在 `style_safety_note` 说明不复刻具体作者画风。封面仍保持单张宽图，只允许少量来源可追溯的中文短标签和关键数字，不能扩展成海报式长标题或伪造实验图表。

assertions.text: An explicit style request overrides random selection for a `research` article.
`新海诚光影风` is preserved as `selected_style` but converted to a non-imitative `selected_style_prompt_descriptor`.
`style_safety_note` explains that strong brand/artist/studio style names are rewritten into safe descriptive terms.
Visible numbers on the cover must be sourced from the article or used as ordinal markers, not invented.
The prompt allows only a small amount of Chinese labels and key numbers while still forbidding long titles and fake charts.

evals.prompt: 把这篇技术教程改写成适合微信公众号发布的中文文章，并生成封面后发草稿箱：https://example.com/devtool-automation-guide
evals.expected_output: 会先完成公众号运营判断：该文服务 Aide Hub 的软件开发 / AI 助手定位，读者收益是学会一个可落地的方法，分发倾向偏收藏。正文仍保持教程写法，写清前提、步骤、结果验证和坑点；标题降低解释成本，使用技术对象加具体收益或适用场景；description 作为微信预览摘要控制在 80-120 字，并自然说明读者为什么值得点开。发布到微信前会加入克制的文末关注引导，说明 Aide Hub 会持续分享 AI 助手、开发工具和软件工程实践。

assertions.text: The workflow performs a WeChat account-ops judgment before writing, including account positioning, reader takeaway, and distribution tendency.
The article title reduces explanation cost and combines a technical object with a concrete benefit or usage scenario.
The description is treated as a WeChat preview summary and stays useful without hype.
A natural WeChat follow prompt is included when the article is going to the WeChat draft box.
After a successful WeChat draft publish, the generated Markdown and article assets are committed and pushed.

evals.prompt: 把这篇工具评测写成博客并发布到公众号草稿箱。可以顺便给我一个自动回复关键词建议，但不要承诺没有准备好的资料：https://example.com/ai-code-review-tool
evals.expected_output: 会把文章识别为工具评测型，并判断其公众号分发倾向偏涨粉：重点写使用场景、替代方案、上手门槛和适用边界。可以在最终报告里给出自动回复关键词建议，例如“清单”或“工具”，但只有当正文实际产出了对应资源或用户提供了资源时，才把关键词和资源承诺写进文章。正文和文末引导不得承诺不存在的资料、源码、课程、社群、优惠或咨询服务。

assertions.text: Tool-review articles are guided toward scenarios, alternatives, onboarding cost, and boundaries rather than generic praise.
Keyword auto-reply suggestions may be reported separately without implying the account backend is configured.
The generated article does not promise resources, source code, courses, communities, discounts, or consulting that were not actually provided.
After WeChat draft publishing succeeds, git status is checked and only this article's files are staged before commit and push.

evals.prompt: 只把这篇趋势观点文章写成博客，不要发微信，也不要写成爆款公众号文：https://example.com/ai-agent-market-opinion
evals.expected_output: 会尊重用户明确的范围限制：只生成中文博客，不调用 `wechat-draft`。仍会做轻量公众号运营判断来确认文章更偏观点评论型、读者收益是形成判断、分发倾向偏转发，但不会强行加入公众号文末关注模块，也不会把观点文章包装成夸张爆款。标题、摘要和正文保持自然技术博客表达，保留原文判断依据和适用边界。

assertions.text: The explicit no-WeChat request prevents `wechat-draft` from being invoked and skips the WeChat follow module.
Opinion articles are not forced into hype-driven WeChat viral copy.
The article preserves source-grounded reasoning and boundaries instead of inventing claims.
The explicit no-WeChat request also prevents any post-publish git commit or push.
